description: Singapore SME prospecting search matrix v2 — directory-grounded seeding only

directory_sources.name: Singapore Manufacturers' Federation (SMF)
directory_sources.rationale: Official manufacturing industry body — verified SME member registry covering precision engineering, food, packaging sub-sectors
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse member directory at smfederation.org.sg, filter by sub-sector

directory_sources.name: Logistics Association Singapore (LAS)
directory_sources.rationale: Covers 3PL, freight forwarding, warehousing SME members with active Singapore operations
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse member listings at las.org.sg/members

directory_sources.name: Singapore Business Federation (SBF) Member Directory
directory_sources.rationale: Cross-sector SME registry — largest business federation in Singapore with filterable company listings
directory_sources.search_approach: Search SBF member directory filtered to manufacturing and logistics categories

directory_sources.name: Singapore Precision Engineering Association (SPEA)
directory_sources.rationale: Covers CNC machining, tooling, precision parts SMEs — sub-sector with strong automation pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse member list on spea.org.sg

pain_signals: hiring operations coordinators at scale without automation
expanding warehouse capacity manually
implementing legacy ERP under pressure
supply chain delays and stockouts
manual inventory tracking across multiple locations

directory_sources.name: Retail Association of Singapore (RAS)
directory_sources.rationale: Official retail industry body — member directory includes specialty retailers, F&B chains, and boutique brands
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse member listings on ras.org.sg/members

directory_sources.name: Singapore Business Federation (SBF) Member Directory
directory_sources.rationale: Broad SME registry — filter to wholesale, retail, and consumer goods categories
directory_sources.search_approach: Search SBF directory filtered to retail and consumer goods sector

directory_sources.name: Singapore Chinese Chamber of Commerce & Industry (SCCCI)
directory_sources.rationale: Large chamber with strong retail and trading SME membership base in Singapore
directory_sources.search_approach: Search SCCCI member directory for retail and trading members

pain_signals: customer support volume scaling faster than team
inventory management across multiple channels
returns processing bottleneck
personalisation at scale without data team
multi-channel order management chaos

directory_sources.name: Singapore Fintech Association (SFA)
directory_sources.rationale: Official fintech industry body — member directory includes early-stage and growth-stage fintech SMEs
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse member directory on singaporefintech.org/members

directory_sources.name: Association of Financial Advisers Singapore (AFA)
directory_sources.rationale: Covers IFA and wealth advisory firms — high compliance burden, strong automation pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Search AFA member firm listings on afa.org.sg

directory_sources.name: Life Insurance Association Singapore (LIA)
directory_sources.rationale: Insurance sector SME members with manual policy operations and claims workflows
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse LIA member companies and associated advisory firms

directory_sources.name: Singapore Business Federation (SBF) — Financial Services
directory_sources.rationale: Supplementary source — filter to financial services and accounting firms
directory_sources.search_approach: Filter SBF directory to financial services and accounting categories

pain_signals: compliance reporting manual process consuming resources
fraud detection requiring manual review queue
customer KYC onboarding bottleneck
loan underwriting manual and slow
regulatory reporting labour-intensive

directory_sources.name: Law Society of Singapore — Law Firm Directory
directory_sources.rationale: Official registry of all practicing law firms in Singapore — strong document automation pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Search law firm directory on lawsociety.org.sg/find-a-lawyer

directory_sources.name: Institute of Singapore Chartered Accountants (ISCA)
directory_sources.rationale: Official accounting body — SME accounting and audit firms with manual billing and compliance workflows
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse ISCA public practice firm directory

directory_sources.name: Singapore Institute of Architects (SIA)
directory_sources.rationale: Covers architecture and design consultancy firms — proposal and project management pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Search SIA registered practice directory on sia.org.sg

directory_sources.name: Association of Small & Medium Enterprises (ASME)
directory_sources.rationale: SME-focused association with broad professional services membership including HR, consulting, and advisory firms
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse ASME member directory filtered to professional services

pain_signals: document review and contract analysis manual
billing invoicing and collections manual process
knowledge management gaps across teams
proposal writing time-intensive
research and analysis bottleneck slowing delivery

directory_sources.name: Committee for Private Education (CPE) — Registered School List
directory_sources.rationale: Official Singapore government registry of all registered private education institutions — verified, active entities
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse CPE registered school list at cpe.gov.sg/home/for-students/registered-schools

directory_sources.name: SkillsFuture Singapore — Approved Training Organisation List
directory_sources.rationale: Registry of approved corporate training providers — SMEs with scheduling and enrolment pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Search SkillsFuture Course Directory for ATO (Approved Training Organisation) listings

directory_sources.name: Singapore Business Federation (SBF) — Education Sector
directory_sources.rationale: Supplementary source for education and enrichment SMEs not on CPE/SkillsFuture lists
directory_sources.search_approach: Filter SBF member directory to education and training category

pain_signals: manual student enrolment and scheduling across multiple centres
tutor-to-student matching and timetabling done in spreadsheets
parent communication and progress updates handled manually
corporate training scheduling and attendance tracking manual
student payment collection and reminders managed by admin staff

directory_sources.name: Singapore Chinese Chamber of Commerce & Industry (SCCCI)
directory_sources.rationale: Largest chamber in Singapore — strong wholesale and trading SME membership across food, consumer goods, and industrial sectors
directory_sources.search_approach: Search SCCCI member directory filtered to wholesale and trading categories

directory_sources.name: Singapore Business Federation (SBF) — Wholesale & Trade
directory_sources.rationale: Cross-sector business federation — filter to wholesale trade and distribution category
directory_sources.search_approach: Filter SBF member directory to wholesale and distribution sector

directory_sources.name: Singapore Malay Chamber of Commerce & Industry (SMCCI)
directory_sources.rationale: Active chamber with wholesale food, consumer goods, and trading SME members
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse SMCCI member directory for trading and distribution companies

pain_signals: manual order processing and inventory reconciliation across branches
wholesale pricing and discount management done in spreadsheets
distributor route planning and delivery tracking manual
multi-location stock visibility gaps causing stockouts or overstock
customer reorder reminders and follow-ups done manually

directory_sources.name: Singapore Medical Association (SMA) — Clinic Directory
directory_sources.rationale: Official registry of GP clinics and specialist practices — appointment and patient management pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Search SMA clinic finder and member practice listings

directory_sources.name: Singapore Dental Association (SDA)
directory_sources.rationale: Registry of dental practices — multi-location clinic chains with scheduling and billing inefficiencies
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse SDA member practice directory

directory_sources.name: Allied Health Professions Council (AHPC)
directory_sources.rationale: Covers physiotherapy, occupational therapy, and allied health practices — underserved on automation
directory_sources.search_approach: Search AHPC registered premises and practices

directory_sources.name: Singapore Business Federation (SBF) — Healthcare
directory_sources.rationale: Supplementary source for healthcare SMEs not covered by professional bodies (e.g. homecare, wellness)
directory_sources.search_approach: Filter SBF directory to healthcare and wellness sector

pain_signals: appointment scheduling and reminders manual
patient records management fragmented
billing and insurance claims processing slow
patient engagement and follow-up manual
clinical operations reporting manual

Electricity, Gas, Steam and Air Conditio.sub_sector_focus: Focus on these five sub-sectors: (1) ACMV contractors — air-conditioning installation, mechanical ventilation, refrigeration servicing (BCA ME05); (2) electrical works contractors — commercial and industrial electrical installation (BCA EW01/EW02); (3) plumbing and gas fitting contractors (BCA ME11); (4) energy management companies and ESCOs — Green Mark consultancies, energy audit firms, retro-commissioning specialists; (5) building automation system (BAS) integrators. Do NOT include electricity retailers — most Singapore independent retailers wound up in 2021.

directory_sources.name: Energy Market Authority (EMA) — Licensed Electricity Retailers
directory_sources.rationale: Official Singapore government registry of all licensed electricity retailers — includes SME-scale independent retailers with billing and customer management automation pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Search EMA licensed retailer list at ema.gov.sg/our-work/retail-market — focus on smaller independent retailers, not SP Group or large utilities

directory_sources.name: BCA Contractors Registry — ME05 (Air-Conditioning & Mechanical Ventilation Works)
directory_sources.rationale: Official BCA registry of licensed ACMV contractors — SME aircon installation and maintenance firms with technician scheduling and compliance documentation pain
directory_sources.search_approach: Search BCA contractor registry filtered to ME05 workhead, C2–B1 grade range (SGD 650K–30M revenue range)

directory_sources.name: BCA Contractors Registry — EW01/EW02 (Electrical Works)
directory_sources.rationale: Registry of licensed electrical installation contractors — SME firms with manual job scheduling, certification tracking, and billing bottlenecks
directory_sources.search_approach: Search BCA contractor registry filtered to EW01 or EW02 workhead, C2–B1 grade range

directory_sources.name: Singapore Contractors Association (SCAL) — M&E Specialist Members
directory_sources.rationale: SCAL M&E specialist contractor members include ACMV, gas fitting, and electrical SMEs — active industry directory with contact details
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse SCAL member directory filtered to mechanical and electrical specialist contractors at scal.com.sg/members

pain_signals: technician scheduling and dispatch across multiple job sites managed in spreadsheets or phone calls
service contract billing and renewal tracking manual — missed renewals and late invoicing common
spare parts inventory across service vehicles untracked in real time
compliance certification and service report documentation manual and paper-based
customer service call follow-up and complaint resolution slow without a system

directory_sources.name: BCA Contractors Registry
directory_sources.rationale: Official BCA contractor registry — all licensed Singapore construction companies with grade-based revenue signals
directory_sources.search_approach: Search BCA directory for CW01/CW02 grade C2–B1 contractors (SGD 1–30M revenue range)

directory_sources.name: Singapore Contractors Association (SCAL)
directory_sources.rationale: Official contractors association — member list includes active SGD 1–15M general and specialist contractors
directory_sources.search_approach: Browse SCAL member directory on scal.com.sg

pain_signals: project scheduling and subcontractor coordination done in spreadsheets
site progress reporting and documentation manual
manpower deployment and timesheet tracking inefficient
procurement and purchase order approvals slow and paper-based
client progress updates and variation order tracking manual
